sections.HOW:
OPERATIONAL METHOD — ILLEGAL BETTING
1. Creates Telegram channel with betting platform brand name
   (Mahadev Book, World777, Laser247, Reddy Anna, etc.)
2. Posts operator phone number in channel description or 
   first pinned message for customer contact
3. Recruits sub-agents via WhatsApp to expand network
4. Collects betting funds via UPI, crypto, or hawala
5. Pays winning bets in cash or crypto to avoid banking trail
6. Rotates channels after police action — same phone, new channel

sections.NEXT_STEPS:
RECOMMENDED NEXT STEPS
1. File complaint at NOGC portal: nogc.gov.in (reference phone +918824645116)
2. Submit to I4C cybercrime portal: cybercrime.gov.in
3. File FIR: Public Gambling Act 1867 + Online Gaming Act 2025 §8
4. Phone subpoena: request subscriber identity for +918824645116 from telecom
5. Request Telegram channel takedown via MHA portal
6. Cross-reference phone against bank KYC for UPI/account linkage
